name: pricing-compare
description: A semantic comparison table that puts plans in columns and features in rows for a scannable, at-a-glance comparison. The recommended plan's column is accent-tinted; checked cells carry a screen-reader label. Below the available width the table scrolls horizontally inside its frame instead of overflowing the page, with the first column pinned to keep context. Reveals on mount and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a real table with a caption, column header cells (scope=col) for each plan and row header cells (scope=row) for each feature
Check / dash cells expose a visually-hidden 'Included' / 'Not included' label so meaning does not rely on the icon alone
The section title is an h2 that labels the section landmark
CTAs render as real links when given an href, otherwise as buttons
The reveal animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a feature comparison table across pricing plans
a pricing matrix with checkmarks per plan and feature
examples: <PricingCompare title="Compare plans" plans={[{ name: 'Starter', price: '$0', period: '/ mo', action: { label: 'Get started', href: '/signup' } }, { name: 'Pro', price: '$29', period: '/ mo', featured: true, action: { label: 'Choose Pro', href: '/signup' } }]} rows={[{ label: 'Projects', values: ['3', 'Unlimited'] }, { label: 'Priority support', values: [false, true] }]} />
